'''鈭歴h-n-g''' ('''shanaga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:preblanch|preblanch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-n-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:preblanch|preblanch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-n-g
|-
! Lemma
| shanaga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shanagithi|shanagithi]] || [[word:shanagiji|shanagiji]] || [[word:shanagishi|shanagishi]] || [[word:shanagi|shanagi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shanaguthuth|shanaguthuth]] || [[word:shanagujuj|shanagujuj]] || [[word:shanagushush|shanagushush]] || [[word:shanag|shanag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shanaguthu|shanaguthu]] || [[word:shanaguju|shanaguju]] || [[word:shanagushu|shanagushu]] || [[word:shanagu|shanagu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shanagufuth|shanagufuth]] || [[word:shanagufuj|shanagufuj]] || [[word:shanagufush|shanagufush]] || [[word:shanaguf|shanaguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shanagethe|shanagethe]] || [[word:shanageje|shanageje]] || [[word:shanageshe|shanageshe]] || [[word:shanage|shanage]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shanagothoth|shanagothoth]] || [[word:shanagojoj|shanagojoj]] || [[word:shanagoshosh|shanagoshosh]] || [[word:shanag|shanag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shanagotho|shanagotho]] || [[word:shanagojo|shanagojo]] || [[word:shanagosho|shanagosho]] || [[word:shanago|shanago]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shanagofoth|shanagofoth]] || [[word:shanagofoj|shanagofoj]] || [[word:shanagofosh|shanagofosh]] || [[word:shanagof|shanagof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shanag忙th忙|shanag忙th忙]] || [[word:shanag忙j忙|shanag忙j忙]] || [[word:shanag忙sh忙|shanag忙sh忙]] || [[word:shanag忙|shanag忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shanagathath|shanagathath]] || [[word:shanagajaj|shanagajaj]] || [[word:shanagashash|shanagashash]] || [[word:shanag|shanag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shanagatha|shanagatha]] || [[word:shanagaja|shanagaja]] || [[word:shanagasha|shanagasha]] || [[word:shanaga|shanaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shanagafath|shanagafath]] || [[word:shanagafaj|shanagafaj]] || [[word:shanagafash|shanagafash]] || [[word:shanagaf|shanagaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shanagasha|shanagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanagasha|goshanagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanagasha|gokishanagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shanagn眉sha|shanagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanagnkn眉sha|goshanagnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanagn眉sha|gokishanagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanagsh毛sha|shanagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanagnksh毛sha|goshanagnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanagsh毛sha|gokishanagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanagrosha|shanagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanagnkrosha|goshanagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanagrosha|gokishanagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanagmusha|shanagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanagnkmusha|goshanagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanagmusha|gokishanagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanagsherasha|shanagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanagnksherasha|goshanagnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanagsherasha|gokishanagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanagngasha|shanagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanagnkngasha|goshanagnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanagngasha|gokishanagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanagyasha|shanagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanagnkyasha|goshanagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanagyasha|gokishanagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanagyamasha|shanagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanagnkyamasha|goshanagnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanagyamasha|gokishanagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanagn眉sh毛sha|shanagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanagnkn眉sh毛sha|goshanagnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanagn眉sh毛sha|gokishanagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanagn眉rosha|shanagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanagnkn眉rosha|goshanagnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanagn眉rosha|gokishanagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanagn眉musha|shanagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanagnkn眉musha|goshanagnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanagn眉musha|gokishanagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanagsh毛n眉sha|shanagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanagnksh毛n眉sha|goshanagnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanagsh毛n眉sha|gokishanagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanagsh毛rosha|shanagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanagnksh毛rosha|goshanagnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanagsh毛rosha|gokishanagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanagsh毛musha|shanagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanagnksh毛musha|goshanagnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanagsh毛musha|gokishanagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanagron眉sha|shanagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanagnkron眉sha|goshanagnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanagron眉sha|gokishanagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanagrosh毛sha|shanagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanagnkrosh毛sha|goshanagnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanagrosh毛sha|gokishanagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanagromusha|shanagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanagnkromusha|goshanagnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanagromusha|gokishanagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanagmun眉sha|shanagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanagnkmun眉sha|goshanagnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanagmun眉sha|gokishanagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanagmush毛sha|shanagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanagnkmush毛sha|goshanagnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanagmush毛sha|gokishanagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanagmurosha|shanagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanagnkmurosha|goshanagnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanagmurosha|gokishanagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shanag|shanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sh忙n忙g|sh忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshanag|hoshanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosh忙n忙g|hosh忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshanag|hohoshanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosh忙n忙g|hohosh忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉shanag|n眉shanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉sh忙n忙g|n眉sh忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉shanag|n眉n眉shanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sh忙n忙g|n眉n眉sh忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂shanag|n茂shanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂sh忙n忙g|n茂sh忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂shanag|n茂n茂shanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sh忙n忙g|n茂n茂sh忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushanag|lushanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lush忙n忙g|lush忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushanag|lulushanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulush忙n忙g|lulush忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishanag|lishanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lish忙n忙g|lish忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishanag|lilishanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilish忙n忙g|lilish忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshanag|koshanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosh忙n忙g|kosh忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshanag|kokoshanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosh忙n忙g|kokosh忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshanag|keshanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesh忙n忙g|kesh忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshanag|kekeshanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesh忙n忙g|kekesh忙n忙g]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
